name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation)
description: Premium wireless earbuds featuring active noise cancellation, adaptive transparency mode, and personalized spatial audio. Up to 6 hours of listening time with MagSafe charging case.

name: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max
description: Powerful streaming media player with Wi-Fi 6E support, Alexa Voice Remote, and access to over 1.5 million movies and TV episodes. Supports Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and Dolby Atmos audio.

name: Anker USB C Charger 40W
description: Dual-port USB-C wall charger with PowerIQ 3.0 technology delivering 20W per port. Compact foldable plug design, compatible with iPhone, Samsung Galaxy, iPad, and more.

name: Samsung Galaxy Buds FE
description: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, 3 microphones, and rich bass-forward sound. IPX2 water-resistant with up to 6 hours of battery life and touch controls.

name: Logitech C920x HD Pro Webcam
description: Full HD 1080p webcam with dual stereo microphones and automatic light correction. Perfect for video calls, streaming, and recording with a 78-degree field of view.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
description: Versatile 6-quart programmable cooker that replaces 7 kitchen appliances: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, saute pan, yogurt maker, and warmer. 13 one-touch programs.

name: Ninja Professional Plus Blender
description: 1400-peak-watt motor blender with 72-oz total crushing pitcher, Auto-iQ technology, and four preset programs. Crushes ice, blends frozen fruits, and purees soups with ease.

name: Lodge 10.25 Inch Cast Iron Skillet
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet with unmatched heat retention and even heating. Oven safe to any temperature, works on all cooktops including induction. Made in the USA.

name: Keurig K-Classic Coffee Maker
description: Single-serve K-Cup pod coffee maker with a 48-oz water reservoir, multiple brew sizes (6, 8, 10 oz), and auto-off feature. Brews a fresh cup in under a minute.

name: OXO Good Grips 11-Piece Everyday Kitchen Tool Set
description: Complete cooking utensil set including tongs, spatula, ladle, spoon, and more. Soft, non-slip handles and heat-resistant nylon heads safe for nonstick cookware.

name: Stanley Quencher H2.0 FlowState Tumbler 40 oz
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated tumbler that keeps drinks cold for 11 hours and iced for 2 days. Features a rotating three-position lid and ergonomic handle. Dishwasher safe.

name: Fitbit Charge 6 Fitness Tracker
description: Advanced fitness tracker with built-in GPS, heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and 40+ exercise modes. 7-day battery life and water-resistant to 50 meters.

name: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat 71-Inch
description: Professional-grade 6mm thick yoga mat with dense cushioning and superior joint protection. Closed-cell surface prevents sweat from seeping in. Lifetime guarantee.

name: Under Armour Adult Hustle 5.0 Backpack
description: Durable water-repellent backpack with UA Storm technology, soft-lined laptop sleeve fitting up to 15-inch laptops, and multiple organization pockets. Ergonomic shoulder straps.

name: Speedo Unisex Adult Swim Goggles Vanquisher 2.0
description: Competition swim goggles with panoramic anti-fog lens for clear wide vision. UV protection, flexible silicone seal, and speed-fit clip for easy adjustment.

name: Maybelline Lash Sensational Sky High Mascara
description: Lengthening and volumizing mascara with a flex tower brush for reaching every lash. Buildable formula delivers a full fan-out effect without clumping. Washable formula.

name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
description: Rich, non-greasy moisturizer with 3 essential ceramides and hyaluronic acid. Developed with dermatologists, fragrance-free and suitable for dry to very dry skin. 19-oz jar.

name: Revlon One-Step Volumizer PLUS Hair Dryer and Styler
description: 2-in-1 hair dryer and volumizer hot air brush that delivers salon-worthy blowouts at home. Ionic technology reduces frizz while the oval brush design smooths hair.

name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel Moisturizer
description: Lightweight water-gel face moisturizer with hyaluronic acid that instantly quenches dry skin. Oil-free, non-comedogenic, and absorbs quickly for smooth, supple skin.

name: Olaplex No. 3 Hair Perfector
description: At-home bond-building treatment that reduces breakage, strengthens hair, and restores healthy appearance. Patented technology works on all hair types for visibly stronger, shinier hair.

name: LEGO Classic Large Creative Brick Box
description: 790-piece building set with 33 different colors of LEGO bricks in a convenient storage box. Includes windows, doors, wheels, eyes, and a green baseplate for endless creative building.

name: Play-Doh Modeling Compound 10-Pack
description: Set of 10 two-ounce cans of classic Play-Doh in assorted colors. Non-toxic modeling compound for creative play, squishing, and shaping. Ages 2 and up.

name: Monopoly Classic Board Game
description: The classic family board game of buying, selling, and trading properties. Includes game board, 8 tokens, 28 title deed cards, play money, and dice. For 2-8 players ages 8+.

name: Magna-Tiles Clear Colors 100-Piece Set
description: Magnetic building tiles in translucent colors for open-ended creative play. STEM-approved toy that develops spatial awareness and fine motor skills. Compatible with all Magna-Tiles sets.

name: Hot Wheels 20-Car Pack
description: Set of 20 die-cast Hot Wheels vehicles in 1:64 scale with authentic decos and cool designs. Great for racing, collecting, and imaginative play. Styles may vary.

name: iRobot Roomba 694 Robot Vacuum
description: Wi-Fi connected robot vacuum with personalized cleaning suggestions. 3-stage cleaning system lifts dirt, debris, and pet hair from carpets and hard floors. Works with Alexa.

name: Yankee Candle Large Jar Candle - Vanilla Cupcake
description: Premium soy-wax blend candle with rich vanilla cupcake fragrance. Burns for up to 150 hours with a natural fiber wick for consistent scent throw throughout the room.

name: Beckham Hotel Collection Bed Pillows (2-Pack)
description: Premium gel-filled pillows with fade and stain-resistant cover. Luxuriously soft with gel fiber filling for optimal comfort and support. Machine washable, queen size.

name: Govee Smart LED Strip Lights 65.6ft
description: Wi-Fi RGB LED strip lights with app control, music sync, and Alexa/Google Assistant compatibility. 16 million colors and 64 scene modes for room decoration.

name: Utopia Towels Cotton Bath Towels Set (8-Pack)
description: 100% ring-spun cotton towels including 2 bath towels, 2 hand towels, and 4 washcloths. Soft, absorbent, and quick-drying. Machine washable and tumble dry friendly.

name: IRIS USA Top Entry Cat Litter Box
description: Enclosed top-entry litter box with grooved lid that catches litter from paws. Large interior space with rounded corners for easy cleaning. Includes scoop.

name: KONG Classic Dog Toy, Large
description: Ultra-durable natural rubber dog toy with unpredictable bounce for interactive play. Hollow center can be stuffed with treats for extended engagement. Veterinarian recommended.

name: Purina Pro Plan High Protein Dog Food
description: Premium dry dog food with real chicken as the first ingredient. Formulated with probiotics for digestive and immune health. 35-pound bag for adult dogs.

name: Furminator Undercoat deShedding Tool for Dogs
description: Professional grooming tool that reaches through topcoat to safely remove loose undercoat hair. Stainless steel edge, ergonomic handle, and FURejector button for easy hair release.

name: PetSafe Easy Walk Dog Harness
description: No-pull dog harness with front chest leash attachment that naturally discourages pulling. Padded belly strap for comfort and quick-snap buckles for easy on/off. Medium size.

name: Sharpie Permanent Markers 24-Count Pack
description: Assorted color fine-point permanent markers with quick-drying, fade-resistant ink. Bold writing on most surfaces including plastic, metal, and glass. AP certified non-toxic.

name: AmazonBasics Mesh Desk Organizer
description: 5-compartment desktop organizer with mesh construction for optimal ventilation. Includes drawer, pen holder, and file sections. Keeps workspace tidy and supplies accessible.

name: HP 63 Original Ink Cartridge Combo (Black & Tri-Color)
description: Genuine HP ink cartridge 2-pack with black and tri-color cartridges. Produces sharp text and vivid graphics. Compatible with HP DeskJet, ENVY, and OfficeJet printers.

name: Post-it Super Sticky Notes 15-Pad Pack
description: Brightly colored 3x3 inch sticky notes with 2X the sticking power. Stick securely to more surfaces and remove cleanly. 15 pads, 45 sheets per pad.

name: Swingline Stapler, 747 Classic Desktop
description: All-metal construction desktop stapler with open channel loading and non-skid rubber base. Staples up to 20 sheets at a time. Built to last with die-cast metal design.

name: Chemical Guys Car Wash Soap and Shampoo
description: Premium car wash concentrate with high-foaming formula that safely lifts dirt and grime without stripping wax or sealant. pH balanced and biodegradable. 16-oz bottle.

name: NOCO Boost Plus GB40 Jump Starter
description: 1000-amp portable lithium-ion car battery jump starter for up to 6-liter gas and 3-liter diesel engines. Features USB power bank, LED flashlight, and compact design.

name: Armor All Car Interior Cleaner Wipes (50-Count)
description: Pre-moistened cleaning wipes that safely remove dust, dirt, and grime from dashboards, consoles, door panels, and steering wheels. Leaves a matte finish without greasy residue.

name: Meguiar's Ultimate Liquid Wax
description: Advanced synthetic polymer wax that provides long-lasting protection and a brilliant high-gloss finish. Easy to apply and remove with ThinFilm technology. 16-oz bottle.

name: Garmin Dash Cam Mini 2
description: Ultra-compact dash camera with 1080p HD recording, 140-degree field of view, and voice control. Features cloud connectivity, incident detection, and parking surveillance mode.

name: DEWALT 20V MAX Cordless Drill/Driver Kit
description: Compact and lightweight drill/driver with 300 unit watts of power, 2-speed transmission (0-450/0-1500 RPM), and 1/2-inch ratcheting chuck. Includes battery, charger, and kit bag.

name: CRAFTSMAN Mechanics Tool Set (230-Piece)
description: Comprehensive mechanics tool set with 72-tooth ratchets, SAE and metric sockets, combination wrenches, and hex keys. Chrome finish for corrosion resistance. Includes hard case.

name: Gorilla Heavy Duty Construction Adhesive
description: All-purpose construction adhesive with 100% tough strength for indoor and outdoor projects. Bonds wood, stone, metal, ceramic, and more. Water-resistant and paintable.

name: Milwaukee 25ft Compact Tape Measure
description: Heavy-duty tape measure with EXO360 blade technology and nylon bond coating. Features a compact frame, magnetic tip, and finger stop for one-handed operation.

name: BLACK+DECKER Random Orbit Sander
description: Compact 2-amp orbital sander with 12,000 OPM for smooth finishing on wood, metal, and plastic. Hook-and-loop system for easy paper changes. Includes dust collection bag.
